Name: JigglerBehaviorSlideParam
Description: Determines the movement behavior of a jiggle bone.

Fields.Name: Minimum Acceleration for Movement
Fields.Description: The minimum acceleration to start the movement of the bone. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Acceleration for Maximum Movement
Fields.Description: The acceleration at which the movement force reaches it maximum value. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Minimum Velocity for Movement
Fields.Description: The minimum velocity to start the movement of the bone. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Velocity for Maximum Movement
Fields.Description: The velocity at which the movement force reaches it maximum value. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Movement Acceleration: X-Axis
Fields.Description: The coefficient for moving along the X-axis with regards to velocity and acceleration.

Fields.Name: Movement Acceleration: Y-Axis
Fields.Description: The coefficient for moving along the Y-axis with regards to velocity and acceleration.

Fields.Name: Movement Acceleration: Z-Axis
Fields.Description: The coefficient for moving along the Z-axis with regards to velocity and acceleration.

Fields.Name: Movement Decay: X-Axis
Fields.Description: The coefficient that dampens the movement velocity on the X-axis.

Fields.Name: Movement Decay: Y-Axis
Fields.Description: The coefficient that dampens the movement velocity on the Y-axis.

Fields.Name: Movement Decay: Y-Axis
Fields.Description: The coefficient that dampens the movement velocity on the Y-axis.

Fields.Name: Reflection Rate at Minimum Position: X-Axis
Fields.Description: The reflection rate when the X-axis position reaches it's minimum position.

Fields.Name: Reflection Rate at Maximum Position: X-Axis
Fields.Description: The reflection rate when the X-axis position reaches it's maximum position.

Fields.Name: Reflection Rate at Minimum Position: Y-Axis
Fields.Description: The reflection rate when the Y-axis position reaches it's minimum position.

Fields.Name: Reflection Rate at Maximum Position: Y-Axis
Fields.Description: The reflection rate when the Y-axis position reaches it's maximum position.

Fields.Name: Reflection Rate at Minimum Position: Z-Axis
Fields.Description: The reflection rate when the Z-axis position reaches it's minimum position.

Fields.Name: Reflection Rate at Maximum Position: Z-Axis
Fields.Description: The reflection rate when the Z-axis position reaches it's maximum position.
